title: A Look At Aehr Test Systems Valuation After New AI Contract Wins And Analyst Upgrade
text: Following Aehr Test Systems' announcement of a $41 million contract win from a major hyperscaler customer and subsequent analyst upgrades, the stock's valuation has come into focus. Craig-Hallum upgraded Aehr to Buy from Hold with a $68 price target, citing improving business momentum and significant growth opportunities in AI processor testing and data center infrastructure. William Blair maintained an Outperform rating, highlighting AEHR's leading position in wafer-level and package-level burn-in solutions for advanced semiconductors. The analyst consensus reflects expectations for 71% revenue growth in fiscal 2027, with earnings swinging from a net loss of $0.09 per share to net income of $0.15 per share. The company's substantial backlog of over $50 million in effective orders provides strong visibility into future revenue.
